title: Greeting and Introducing Yourself
prompt: Greet someone and introduce yourself in English.
hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', and say your name.
sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

ja.prompt: 誰かに挨拶して自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you' のようなフレーズを使い、自分の名前を言いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

zh.prompt: 用英文向某人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you' 的片語，並說出你的名字。
zh.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

title: Asking and Answering About Objects
prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What's this?' and 'It's a...'.
hint: Use 'What's this?' to ask about an object and answer with 'It's a...' plus the object's name.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?' を使って物について質問し、'It's a...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What's this?' で物を尋ね、'It's a...' に続けて物の名前を答えましょう。

zh.prompt: 用 'What's this?' 問物品，並用 'It's a...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'What's this?' 問物品，回答時用 'It's a...' 加上物品名稱。

title: Talking About Abilities
prompt: Talk about what you can or cannot do using 'can' and 'can't'.
hint: Use 'I can...' to say what you can do and 'I can't...' to say what you cannot do.
sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'can' と 'can't' を使って、自分のできることやできないことについて話してください。
ja.hint: 'I can...' でできることを、'I can't...' でできないことを言いましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 用 'can' 和 'can't' 談論你能或不能做的事。
zh.hint: 用 'I can...' 說你能做什麼，用 'I can't...' 說你不能做什麼。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

title: Talking About Age
prompt: Ask and answer questions about age using 'How old are you?' and 'I am ... years old.'
hint: Use 'How old are you?' to ask someone's age and answer with 'I am ... years old.'
sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?' を使って年齢を尋ね、'I am ... years old.' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'How old are you?' で年齢を聞き、'I am ... years old.' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

zh.prompt: 用 'How old are you?' 問年齡，並用 'I am ... years old.' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'How old are you?' 問年齡，回答時用 'I am ... years old.'。
zh.sample: How old are you? I am five years old.

title: Talking About Favorite Subjects and Sports
prompt: Talk about your favorite school subject or sport.
hint: Use phrases like 'My favorite subject is...' or 'I like playing...'.
sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科やスポーツについて話してください。
ja.hint: 'My favorite subject is...' や 'I like playing...' のフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

zh.prompt: 談論你喜歡的科目或運動。
zh.hint: 使用 'My favorite subject is...' 或 'I like playing...' 等片語。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

title: Asking for and Giving Directions
prompt: Ask for directions and give simple directions using phrases like 'Where is ...?' and 'Go straight, then turn right.'
hint: Use 'Where is ...?' to ask location and give directions with simple commands.
sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 場所を尋ね、'Where is ...?' や 'Go straight, then turn right.' のようなフレーズで道案内をしてください。
ja.hint: 'Where is ...?' で場所を尋ね、簡単な指示で道案内しましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 問路並用簡單指令給予方向，如 'Where is ...?' 和 'Go straight, then turn right.'。
zh.hint: 用 'Where is ...?' 問地點，並用簡單指令給方向。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

title: Talking About Time and Daily Routine
prompt: Talk about what time you do things and your daily routine.
hint: Use 'What time do you ...?' and answer with times, e.g., 'I get up at six.'
sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

ja.prompt: 何時に何をするかや日課について話してください。
ja.hint: 'What time do you ...?' を使い、時間を答えましょう。例：'I get up at six.'
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

zh.prompt: 談論你做事情的時間和日常作息。
zh.hint: 用 'What time do you ...?' 問時間，並回答時間，如 'I get up at six.'
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

title: Shopping and Asking Prices
prompt: Ask for help in a store and ask about prices.
hint: Use 'May I help you?' and 'How much is it?' to ask for assistance and prices.
sample: May I help you? How much is this hat? It's ten dollars.

ja.prompt: 店で助けを求めたり、値段を尋ねたりしてください。
ja.hint: 'May I help you?' と 'How much is it?' を使いましょう。
ja.sample: May I help you? How much is this hat? It's ten dollars.

zh.prompt: 在商店裡尋求幫助並詢問價格。
zh.hint: 用 'May I help you?' 和 'How much is it?' 問價格和求助。
zh.sample: May I help you? How much is this hat? It's ten dollars.

title: Describing Weather and Clothing
prompt: Describe the weather and what clothes to wear.
hint: Use phrases like 'It's cold and windy', 'Put on your coat', and ask 'Do you like snow?'.
sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please. Do you like snow? Yes, I do.

ja.prompt: 天気や着る服について説明してください。
ja.hint: 'It's cold and windy', 'Put on your coat', 'Do you like snow?' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please. Do you like snow? Yes, I do.

zh.hint: 使用 'It's cold and windy', 'Put on your coat', 'Do you like snow?' 等片語。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please. Do you like snow? Yes, I do.

title: Talking About Feelings and Health
prompt: Talk about how you feel and describe simple health problems.
hint: Use phrases like 'I have a toothache', 'I'm sorry', and 'Are you okay?'.
sample: I have a toothache. Are you okay? Yes, I'm okay.

ja.prompt: 気持ちや簡単な健康問題について話してください。
ja.hint: 'I have a toothache', 'I'm sorry', 'Are you okay?' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I have a toothache. Are you okay? Yes, I'm okay.

zh.prompt: 談論感覺和簡單的健康問題。
zh.hint: 使用 'I have a toothache', 'I'm sorry', 'Are you okay?' 等片語。
zh.sample: I have a toothache. Are you okay? Yes, I'm okay.
